OverProtocol MainnetTestnet completed successfully. Mainnet launching soon!
Node,
Run your own nodeOver Protocol allows you to run a node on your PC, enabling you to experience a streamlined interface.
Node,
Home,
Start staking from homeRun a node and participate in home staking. Over Protocol is open to anyone who wants to contribute and earn Over.
Home,
Lifestyle.
Enjoy a new lifestyle.Home staking paves the way for a new lifestyle, empowering ordinary individuals to become supernormals.
Lifestyle.
Applications within your reach.
On your Desk
The OverNode serves as a streamlined console for the Over Protocol with easy home staking.
On your Palm
The OverWallet will assist you in onboarding onto the Over Protocol. Your Journey on Over Begins with OverWallet

Welcome to OBT Season 2

Recap | The 3rd Online Meet Up
At this meetup, we mainly talked about Open Beta Testnet season 2, OverWallet big update, and OverSpace.
Recap | The 2nd AMA
We are happy to announce the successful completion of our first testnet. We sincerely thank you for your active participation and feedback.
